title: BareBones tweaks - Unique Dyes
description: Barebones version of VT Unique Dyes (no pallete)
body:
![BareBones Tweaks logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/373147ba07cd57733361308be2b6e61c14d36b92.png)

Adds [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) to [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) packs!


See other '**BareBones Tweaks**' packs:
[https://modrinth.com/collection/IkkmwGHM](https://modrinth.com/collection/IkkmwGHM)

### This pack adds:

Adds variation to the dyes by making each one different.

### Credits:
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net) for the Original packs (Amazing resourcepack site)
- [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) (Bare Bones Tweaks is an add-on for Bare Bones)
